artifacts.title: Truthful Runtime Packet-1 Example
artifacts.summary: Candidate packet-1 example run summary showing provenance, degraded classification, defect reporting, and packet-1 non-conformance on a fallback path.

artifacts.title: Truthful Runtime Packet-1 Live Proof (Qwen2.5 Coder 7B)
artifacts.summary: Candidate packet-1 live proof for the original March 14 packet-1 contract and live-boundary subset.

artifacts.title: Truthful Runtime Phase C Cycle-1 Live Closure (Qwen2.5 Coder 7B)
artifacts.summary: Candidate closure packet for the bounded truthful-runtime Phase C live-proof subset frozen on March 14.

artifacts.title: Truthful Runtime Packet-2 Repair-Ledger Live Proof (Qwen2.5 Coder 7B)
artifacts.summary: Candidate repaired-path proof for the March 14 packet-2 repair-ledger slice before the packet-1 boundary cleanup.

artifacts.title: Truthful Runtime Artifact-Provenance Live Proof (Qwen2.5 Coder 7B)
artifacts.summary: Candidate live proof showing artifact-level provenance for generated requirements, design, and code files plus ledger reconstruction.

artifacts.title: Truthful Runtime Packet-1 Boundary-Cleanup Live Proof (Qwen2.5 Coder 7B)
artifacts.summary: Candidate live proof for the corrected packet-1 boundary contract, showing agent_output/main.py as the primary boundary on a real fallback-profile run.

artifacts.title: Truthful Runtime Packet-2 Repair-Ledger Live Proof (Qwen2.5 Coder 7B, Boundary-Fixed)
artifacts.summary: Candidate repaired-path proof under the corrected packet-1 contract, including agent_output/main.py as the primary boundary and preserved intended-path provenance values.

artifacts.title: DG03192026 Governed Evidence Bundle (Runtime Family + S-04)
artifacts.summary: Candidate governed evidence bundle tying the upgraded extension workload provenance family to the live S-04 code-review probe on a single staging consumer surface.

artifacts.title: Prompt Reforger Phase 0 Baseline Generic Service Run
artifacts.summary: Candidate structural proof of the frozen Phase 0 baseline request envelope on the bounded LocalClaw-style textmystery slice, ending truthfully in an unsupported result with blocked live-runtime bookkeeping.

artifacts.title: Prompt Reforger Phase 0 Adapt Generic Service Run
artifacts.summary: Candidate structural proof of the bounded generic Prompt Reforger adapt path, including deterministic candidate scoring, a certified_with_limits bundle section, and an external-consumer verdict recorded as service_adopted.

artifacts.title: Local Model Coding Challenge Repeatability Report
artifacts.summary: Candidate live benchmark report for repeating the challenge_workflow_runtime coding challenge against a local provider-model lane, including turns-to-first-write, turns-to-first-code, repair counts, deepest issue reached, deterministic program hashes, and final blocker families.

artifacts.title: Prompt Reforger Gemma Tool-Use Inventory Checkpoint
artifacts.summary: Candidate live inventory checkpoint freezing the admitted Gemma proposer and FunctionGemma judge surfaces, explicit alias resolution, and the now-ready primary inventory state including the admitted Ollama alias candidate `functiongemma:latest`.

artifacts.title: Prompt Reforger Gemma Tool-Use Cycle Checkpoint
artifacts.summary: Candidate live bounded Gemma-only cycle comparing baseline and prompt-patch candidates across quality and portability targets after the judge blocker cleared, ending in a truthful pause because 12B clears the frozen corpus while 4B portability remains partial.

artifacts.title: Prompt Reforger FunctionGemma Judge Checkpoint
artifacts.summary: Candidate live advisory judge report showing that the admitted native-tool judge contract now yields usable LM Studio fallback verdicts while the Ollama `functiongemma:latest` path remains all-inconclusive on this machine.

artifacts.title: Prompt Reforger Qwen2.5-Coder-7B Probe Run
artifacts.summary: Candidate live cross-family probe on Ollama `qwen2.5-coder:7b` against `challenge_workflow_runtime`, reaching CWR-04 with partial success before a runtime stdout assertion failure.

artifacts.title: Prompt Reforger Qwen2.5-Coder-7B Probe Score
artifacts.summary: Candidate structural score for the exploratory Ollama `qwen2.5-coder:7b` probe, clearing all 5 frozen bootstrap slices and outperforming the current Gemma 4B portability baseline.

artifacts.title: Prompt Reforger Guide-Model Comparison Checkpoint
artifacts.summary: Candidate live guide-model comparison checkpoint for the frozen Gemma tool-use corpus, showing degraded Qwen guide generation, blocked LM Studio Gemma guide warmup, and an environment blocker on target-side quality comparison because the portability baseline target did not produce a score report.

artifacts.title: Governed Repo Change Packet Adversarial Benchmark
artifacts.summary: Candidate mixed benchmark for the first governed repo change packet, showing six failure classes where the standalone packet verifier fails closed while the baseline comparator remains success-shaped or ambiguous.
